name: Cylinder Wake
description: Kármán vortex street behind a circular cylinder at Re ≈ 240. The classic benchmark for external flow and periodic vortex shedding.

product.lesson_headline: Re near 240: a laminar Karman vortex street should appear.
product.export_caption: Cylinder wake: alternating vortices behind a bluff body.
classroom_prompts: Where do vortices first separate from the cylinder?
How does increasing viscosity change the wake?
Why does a probe off the centerline reveal the shedding rhythm?
